task_completion.description: The agent successfully loaded the BraTS MRI volume into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is visible with a brain MRI scan displayed in the Red, Yellow, and Green slice views.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated the slice views to visualize the tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice views (Axial/Red, Sagittal/Yellow, Coronal/Green) show a bright, hyperintense region (the tumor) characteristic of a FLAIR sequence, rather than empty space or healthy tissue only.

task_completion.description: The agent used the ruler/line markup tool to measure the tumor diameter in the slice views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible ruler lines or markup annotations drawn across the tumor region in one or more of the slice views within the Slicer GUI.

task_completion.description: The agent created or edited the JSON report file containing slice indices and measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file preview showing content formatted as JSON with keys like 'axial_slice_index' and 'axial_diameter_mm', or the agent typing this data.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the required screenshot, measurements, and report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or save dialog showing 'optimal_slices_view.png', 'tumor_dimensions.mrk.json', and 'slice_report.json' inside the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the 3D Slicer GUI to perform tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Slicer application window being active, with mouse cursor or focus on the slice views and toolbars, rather than only terminal interactions.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual markup tools provided by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines appear as Slicer markup widgets (colored lines with endpoints) on the image, not just text added later or estimated values.

integrity.description: The agent derived values from the image, not an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open a text file containing the 'answers' or copy-paste slice numbers from the task description/prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tumor appears as a bright (hyperintense) region on the FLAIR MRI sequence. The agent must find the slice with the largest tumor area in three planes: Axial (Red view), Sagittal (Yellow view), and Coronal (Green view). The expected output directory is ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/.
